creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
Initial port of binary distribution of Free Pascal 1.0.4.  This
	is a native Turbo-Like/Delphi-Like Pascal compiler with numerous
	libraries and tools--including Pascal versions of lex and yacc.
	It's considerably more useful than GNU Pascal.

	A source build will await the creation of a bootstrap kit.

Fix: Hated and despised shell archive follows:
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
